mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', COALESCE(r.dong, ''))) AS name, r.sido AS sido, r.sigungu AS sigungu, r.dong AS dong, COUNT(*) AS count FROM meetings m JOIN regions r ON m.region_id = r.region_id WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY r.sido, r.sigungu, r.dong ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, MAX(m.created_at) DESC, r.sido ASC, r.sigungu ASC, r.dong ASC LIMIT 4

SELECT m.meeting_id as meetingId, m.host_user_id as hostUserId, u.nickname AS hostNickname, m.title, m.content, m.place_name as placeName, m.address, m.meeting_date as meetingDate, m.start_time as startTime, m.max_members as maxMembers, m.status, s.name AS sportName, CONCAT(r.sido, " ", r.sigungu, " ", COALESCE(r.dong, "")) AS regionName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meeting_participants mp WHERE mp.meeting_id=m.meeting_id AND mp.status="APPROVED" ) approvedCount FROM meetings m JOIN users u ON m.host_user_id = u.user_id JOIN sports s ON m.sport_id = s.sport_id JOIN regions r ON m.region_id = r.region_id WHERE m.meeting_id = #{meetingId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO meetings( hostUserId, sportId, regionId, title, content, placeName, address, meetingDate, startTime, maxMembers, meetingType, repeatType, supplies, guideText,
status ) VALUES( #{hostUserId}, #{sportId}, #{regionId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{placeName}, #{address}, #{meetingDate}, #{startTime}, #{maxMembers}, #{meetingType}, #{repeatType}, #{supplies}, #{guideText}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE meetings SET title = #{request.title}, content = #{request.content}, placeName = #{request.placeName}, address = #{request.address}, meetingDate = #{request.meetingDate}, startTime = #{request.startTime}, maxMembers = #{request.maxMembers}, status = #{request.status} WHERE meetingId = #{meetingId} AND deletedAt IS NULL
